response.global_analysis: 1. JSON Match: The audio contains conversations and casual banter in both Japanese and English, which required complete manual transcription as the reference JSON was empty. 2. JSON Usage: Fully transcribed and translated manually based on the actual spoken audio. 3. Timing & Pacing: Subtitles are timed to trigger precisely with vocal cues, utilizing aggressive truncation where necessary to handle the overlapping speech and fast pacing of the gameplay chat.
